description_long: This house features a modern, low-profile design with a flat roof and clean, rectangular lines. The structure is divided into two main sections: a larger main living area and a smaller detached or semi-detached unit, possibly a garage or guest suite. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with large glass windows and doors visible on the main facade, allowing for ample natural light. A spacious paved area, likely serving as a driveway or courtyard, connects the two sections and provides access to the entryway. The landscaping is minimal, emphasizing open space and functionality. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on simplicity and geometric form.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious paved courtyard connecting two main sections. The design is minimalist and emphasizes clean lines and open space.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, and the full width of the paved courtyard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the main building and the smaller detached unit, with visible overhangs and minimal landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of both sections, with fewer windows and a clear view of the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the paved area and the relationship between the two main building sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide glass door with a flat overhang and direct access from the paved courtyard, minimal decorative elements.
